overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai walking through a rural Japanese village in spring. The character travels along dirt paths past cherry blossom trees, rice paddies, and traditional wooden farmhouses, with snow-capped mountains visible in the distance.

agents.ego_description: samurai walking steadily along dirt path toward village visible in the distance

entered.detail: tall trees with white blossoms lining the left side of the path
cluster of traditional wooden Japanese houses with dark tiled roofs
dark smoke rising from behind the village buildings
tall green grass and wildflowers alongside the dirt path

segments.scene_description: The samurai walks along a dirt trail flanked by tall grass and white cherry blossom trees. In the distance, a traditional Japanese village with wooden houses is visible, with a plume of smoke rising from beyond the settlement against a bright blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rice paddy field with wooden fence

agents.ego_description: continuing along path beside wooden fence and golden rice paddies

entered.detail: rustic wooden post fence separating path from agricultural fields
golden rice fields ready for harvest
traditional wooden farmhouse with thatched roof

segments.scene_description: The path opens into agricultural fields with a traditional wooden farmhouse on the left. A rustic wooden fence lines the right side of the path, separating the trail from golden rice paddies stretching toward the forest edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: cherry blossom tunnel with falling petals

events.description: cherry blossom petals begin falling heavily through the air around the character

agents.ego_description: walking beneath dense cherry blossom canopy as white petals drift down

entered.detail: dense overhead coverage of blooming cherry branches creating a floral tunnel
white cherry blossom petals drifting down through the air

segments.scene_description: The samurai enters a tunnel of cherry blossom trees in full bloom. White petals drift down through the air, creating a serene atmosphere as sunlight filters through the flowering canopy above the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: village center with stone walls and wooden structures

agents.ego_description: proceeding through village center past stone walls and traditional wooden buildings

entered.detail: low stone wall covered in moss lining the left side of the path
cluster of wooden village houses with weathered planks and tiled roofs
snow-capped mountain visible in the distant background

segments.scene_description: Exiting the cherry blossom tunnel, the scene opens into a village center with moss-covered stone walls and traditional wooden buildings. A snow-capped mountain peak dominates the distant background as the path winds through the settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: hillside shrine approach with stone lanterns

events.description: path turns left toward shrine building situated on the hillside

agents.ego_description: turning left and ascending toward a shrine building with stone lanterns lining the path

entered.detail: traditional Japanese stone lanterns marking the approach to the shrine
large wooden shrine structure with dark tiled roof on the hillside

segments.scene_description: The path turns left toward a hillside shrine, with traditional stone lanterns marking the sacred approach. The samurai walks toward a larger wooden building with a dark tiled roof, surrounded by forested mountains and blooming cherry trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rural trail through a flowering landscape that eventually leads into a traditional village and toward a hillside shrine. It begins with the samurai walking along a dirt path flanked by tall grass and white cherry blossom trees, with a plume of smoke rising over a distant settlement under a bright blue sky. As the path opens, the scene shifts to agricultural fields where a wooden farmhouse and rustic fences border golden rice paddies, before the camera enters a serene tunnel of blooming cherry trees with petals drifting through filtered sunlight. The view then expands into the village center, passing moss-covered stone walls and wooden buildings with a snow-capped mountain peak dominating the horizon. Finally, the path turns left toward a sacred approach marked by stone lanterns, leading the samurai toward a dark-tiled shrine building nestled among forested mountains and flowering trees.
